Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, actionable reference document that consolidates all research and demand data, ready for Dino to make sourcing decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields across campaigns, ad sets, and individual ads for phrase scanning.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides complete visibility across all live ad copy instantly, eliminating the need to manually open and review individual ads one by one.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every ad copy field for specified phrases or patterns and compiles a flagged list noting the exact ad, field, and matched copy for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Accurately identifies every instance of a flagged phrase across hundreds of ads in seconds, ensuring nothing is missed and removing human review error.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the complete flagged results list with each match's ad name, field type, and exact copy excerpt so the team can act immediately.
Meta Investigation.impact: Puts a precise, actionable findings report in the right person's inbox on demand, enabling rapid compliance review or creative corrections.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline continues to grow strong, with 53 total agents across the board — 24 completed, 9 in progress, and 20 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While things were steady on the tracking side, the team continues to push forward on the 9 agents currently in active development. Great work maintaining momentum — we'll keep building toward that planned backlog and share updates as soon as agents start moving through the pipeline!
